name: Hive Commonwealth
description: A collectivist society of flying insects, forged in the chaos of the Shattered World.

goals.name: Maintain Unity
goals.description: The Hive Commonwealth's primary goal is to maintain the integrity of its collective consciousness and protect its members from the corrupting influence of chaos.

goals.name: Expand Influence
goals.description: The Hive Commonwealth seeks to expand its influence and control over the surrounding territories, leveraging its unique abilities and assets to further its interests.

abilities.name: Chaos Marine Fleet
abilities.description: The Hive Commonwealth's military doctrine, focusing on surgical strikes to extract valuable assets from hostile environments.

abilities.name: Quartz Crystal Trading
abilities.description: The Outcast caste controls the trade of quartz crystals, which are abundant in their region and fetch high prices due to their resistance to psionics.

abilities.name: Honey Wine Production
abilities.description: The Hive Commonwealth produces honey wine, a valuable commodity traded by the Outcast caste and prized for its unique properties.

vulnerabilities.name: Isolation
vulnerabilities.description: The Hive Commonwealth's deep-seated need for unity makes it highly vulnerable to isolation and fragmentation.

vulnerabilities.name: Chaos Dragon Influence
vulnerabilities.description: The ambient chaos radiating from the Chaos Dragon, Valkor, actively disrupts and breaks up the collective senses of the Hive Commonwealth, making it a significant threat.
